MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Luis Molina, Esq., for Plaintiff Ernie Velarde.
No appearance by the Defendants: Benjamin Vallejo and Ena Solis.
Parties have not settled, but will likely settle prior to trial.
This matter is taken off the Settlement Conference Calendar.
Trial date is confirmed.
